macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Iran Ceasefire Sparks Risk Asset Recovery Across Markets
items.summary: News of a two-week ceasefire in Iran and safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz has triggered a sharp recovery in global risk assets, with higher equities, bullish yield curve steepening, and broad currency recovery against the dollar as investors assess sustainability of peace.

items.title: Economic Concerns Mount as Gas Prices Surge Amid Iran War
items.summary: Gas prices have climbed to their highest level in four years due to the Iran conflict, adding inflationary pressure to the economy and eroding consumer confidence, with polling showing 76% of Americans view the economy as 'fair' or 'poor' and Republican approval on economic handling declining.

items.title: Federal Reserve: Inflation Remains Above 2% Target Despite Modest Growth
items.summary: A Federal Reserve policymaker reports the U.S. economy is growing at its potential pace with resilient consumer spending, but core inflation has risen 3.0% over 12 months with little progress in lowering it, while the labor market remains roughly in balance but susceptible to shocks.

items.title: Tax Refunds Running 14% Higher Than Last Year, Supporting Consumer Spending
items.summary: Treasury data shows household tax refunds are currently running 14% higher than the prior year, providing a positive boost to consumer spending during tax filing season.

items.title: Consumer Inflation Expectations Rise to 3.4% Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary: The New York Fed's survey shows consumers now expect inflation to reach 3.4% within a year, up from 3% in February before the Middle East conflict escalated.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Anthropic Hits $30 Billion Run Rate as Enterprise Demand Accelerates
items.summary: Anthropic has reached a $30 billion run rate, driven by increasing enterprise adoption of its AI services. The company continues to expand its market presence amid strong demand for its Claude models.

items.title: Anthropic Debuts Project Glasswing with Mythos AI Model for Software Security
items.summary: Anthropic has launched Project Glasswing, leveraging its new Mythos AI model to identify and address software vulnerabilities. The initiative represents a significant partnership effort to reinforce software security through advanced AI capabilities.

items.title: Intel Joins Elon Musk's Terafab AI Chip Project
items.summary: Intel has partnered with Elon Musk's $25 billion Terafab initiative to develop AI chips for humanoid robots and data center applications. The collaboration aims to advance AI infrastructure and computational capabilities.

items.title: FBI Reports $893 Million in AI-Driven Scams
items.summary: The FBI has flagged approximately $893 million in fraudulent activities powered by artificial intelligence. The report highlights growing concerns about AI misuse in criminal schemes.

items.title: Google Updates Gemini with Enhanced Mental Health Safeguards
items.summary: Google has rolled out new safety measures in Gemini to better handle suicide and self-harm-related queries, providing users with mental health resources. The update comes as AI companies face increased scrutiny over content moderation.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: EXD Extra Dimensional Launching April 16 - Praised as Best PC VR Game in Years
items.summary: A new indie PC VR game called EXD Extra Dimensional is set to release on April 16, 2026, and has already garnered significant praise for its fantastic visuals, realistic physics, unique story, and engaging writing. It's being hailed as the best PC VR experience since Vertigo 2.

items.title: Crimson Desert Receives Positive Reception After 175+ Hours of Gameplay
items.summary: Gaming reviewer DrybearGamers has published an extensive review of Crimson Desert after investing over 175 hours in the game, indicating strong engagement and suggesting it could be a 500+ hour completion experience.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
